description:
En Saeta Yield, compañía del grupo Masdar, estamos buscando incorporar un/a Legal Counsel (perfil Legal & Compliance) para unirse a nuestro equipo en nuestras oficinas centrales de Madrid.

Reportando directamente al Legal & Compliance Coordinator, y en estrecha colaboración con las áreas de Corporate, Asset Management, Operaciones, Desarrollo, Desarrollo Corporativo/M&A, Financiación/Refinanciación, Regulación, HSE y ESG/Compliance, dará soporte y liderará (según aplique) la actividad legal de Saeta.

Responsabilidades:


 * Proporcionar asesoramiento legal diario en materias corporativas y comerciales, incluyendo la revisión y negociación de contratos con proveedores de servicios, acuerdos corporativos, apoyo a la secretaría societaria y asistencia legal general al equipo de Saeta.
 * Apoyar la gestión de asuntos corporativos del Grupo Saeta y sus filiales (SPVs), incluyendo la coordinación con notarios, registros mercantiles y otros organismos públicos.
 * Apoyar los aspectos legales de las actividades de gestión de activos de la cartera solar y eólica, incluyendo la redacción y revisión de contratos operativos (O&M, arrendamientos de terreno, proveedores de servicios), reorganizaciones corporativas y operaciones de M&A, bajo la supervisión de la persona coordinadora de Legal y Compliance.
 * Asistir en la gestión legal de los acuerdos de financiación existentes y actuar como apoyo legal en la estructuración y negociación de nuevas operaciones de financiación y refinanciación, coordinándose con entidades financiadoras y asesores externos según sea necesario.
 * Apoyar los aspectos legales de las actividades de desarrollo de Saeta, incluyendo la redacción, revisión y negociación de acuerdos de terrenos, contratos con proveedores de servicios y otra documentación relacionada con el desarrollo.
 * Proporcionar apoyo legal en relación con los procesos de desarrollo y obtención de permisos, incluyendo la revisión de expedientes de presentación y la asistencia en la respuesta a requerimientos de reguladores y otras partes interesadas.
 * Asistir en la estructuración legal de proyectos, incluyendo la redacción y revisión de acuerdos clave del proyecto como PPAs, contratos EPC y otra documentación relevante del proyecto.
 * Redactar, revisar y negociar contratos relacionados con las alianzas empresariales y acuerdos comerciales de Saeta.
 * Mantener un conocimiento sólido del marco contractual de la compañía y sus filiales para identificar obligaciones, riesgos y requisitos de cumplimiento.
 * Apoyar las relaciones con interlocutores internos y externos, actuando como punto de contacto legal bajo la coordinación de la persona coordinadora de Legal y Compliance.
 * Coordinar y gestionar las interacciones con despachos externos que prestan asesoramiento legal a Saeta.
 * Proporcionar apoyo legal en asuntos regulatorios que impacten en las actividades de Saeta.
 * Apoyar las actividades de HSE (Seguridad, Salud y Medioambiente) identificando y asesorando sobre implicaciones legales derivadas de cuestiones relacionadas con HSE.
 * Asistir en la gestión de reclamaciones, disputas y potenciales procedimientos legales relacionados con los contratos de Saeta, incluyendo la implantación de medidas preventivas para mitigar riesgos legales.
 * Apoyar, desde la perspectiva legal, las actividades de compliance y ESG, incluyendo la implementación de políticas y procedimientos internos.
   
   

Requisitos. Formación y experiencia:


 * Grado y/o Máster en Derecho.
 * Excelente dominio del inglés y del español, tanto escrito como hablado.
 * 5–7 años de experiencia como abogado/a colegiado/a (en despacho y/o in-house), con foco en derecho mercantil y contractual y experiencia asesorando en proyectos de infraestructuras o energía.
 * 3+ años de experiencia relevante en el sector energético, idealmente en el sector de energías renovables.

title: Procurement Manager – Leading Global Pharmaceutical
description:
Procurement Manager – Leading Global Pharmaceutical

Madrid

€60,000 to €70,000 plus package

To apply, contact Adam at a.venting@bramwith.com




A well established European healthcare organisation is continuing to invest in its procurement function as part of a wider programme to strengthen supply chain performance and commercial governance. As part of this evolution, they are appointing a Procurement Manager to support high value clinical and scientific spend across the business.




This position sits within a growing procurement team and offers the opportunity to take real ownership of complex direct categories in a regulated environment, working closely with both local and international stakeholders.




Role Summary:

You will be responsible for managing end to end category activity across a portfolio of clinical and scientific procurement areas. The focus is on building clear category strategies, improving supplier performance and ensuring sourcing decisions support operational, regulatory and commercial objectives.




Operating in a matrix environment, you will work closely with medical, operational and functional stakeholders to ensure procurement is seen as a value adding partner rather than a transactional function.




Key responsibilities:

• Define and execute category plans aligned to business priorities, compliance requirements and supply continuity

• Lead sourcing projects from initial analysis through to negotiation, contracting and implementation

• Assess supplier markets to identify cost, risk, resilience and innovation opportunities

• Manage strategic supplier relationships, including performance reviews, KPIs and governance

• Collaborate with internal teams across Medical, Operations, Finance, Legal and Quality

• Monitor spend and savings delivery, providing clear and structured reporting

• Identify supply chain, regulatory and geopolitical risks and develop mitigation actions

• Support the ongoing development of procurement processes, tools and reporting standards




Category scope:

• Clinical and outsourced services

• Laboratory, diagnostic and scientific services

• Equipment, consumables and specialist materials

• Selected external manufacturing and packaging partners




Background and experience:

• Experience in direct procurement or category management within pharma, healthcare, animal health or another regulated sector is ideal but not required.

• Demonstrated capability delivering structured sourcing and supplier negotiations

• Strong stakeholder engagement skills across technical and non technical audiences

• Comfortable working in environments undergoing change or maturity uplift

• Experience tracking value, savings and supplier performance using data and reporting

• Familiarity with procurement systems, analytics tools and contract workflows

• Degree and or CIPS qualification preferred




Personal attributes:

• Commercially minded with a practical, delivery focused approach

• Clear and confident communicator

• Proactive, resilient and comfortable taking accountability

• Experience working with international suppliers and cross border teams




Why consider this opportunity:

This is a visible and influential role within a business that is actively strengthening its procurement capability. You will have the chance to shape how critical clinical and scientific spend is managed, build strong stakeholder relationships and contribute to a broader procurement and supply chain transformation.




To apply, please send your CV to Adam at a.venting@bramwithconsulting.com
sector: Pharmaceutical Manufacturing, Veterinary Services, and Manufacturing

title: Implementation Manager
description:
Implementation Manager - Mid-Level

Location: London, UK or Barcelona, Spain

Type: Full-time, On-site (Hybrid)

Compensation: Competitive Salary + Bonus + ESOP

Reports to: Implementation Team Lead

About AudioStack 🦜

AudioStack is the world's most powerful AI audio production infrastructure, empowering global brands, agencies, and creators to scale high-quality voice and audio production through our Audio-as-a-Service platform. We're pioneering the future of audio automation, personalization, and synthetic voice with cutting-edge AI and a diverse international team.

If you're curious about how technology, creativity, and innovation meet in the world of sound, this is your place.

About The Role

AudioStack is looking for a mid-level Implementation Manager based in either our HQ in London or our Operations Hub in Barcelona to lead customer onboarding and technical implementation projects across our enterprise and mid-market clients.

This is a high-impact and strategic role within our Operations Team and alongside our Customer Success team and is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of project management, client consulting, and technical delivery. This role is hands-on. You will take ownership of complex implementations, work cross-functionally with Sales, Product, and Operations, and ensure our customers successfully deploy AudioStack's AI-powered audio infrastructure, seamlessly integrated into their workflow.

If you enjoy translating business needs into scalable technical solutions and managing stakeholders across commercial and technical teams, plus have a problem-solving hustle mentality, this role is for you!

What You'll Be Doing

As an Implementation Manager, you will own the successful delivery of customer implementations from post-sale handover through go-live and adoption.

Project & Delivery Ownership


 * Lead end-to-end implementation projects for enterprise and mid-market customers
 * Define project scope, timelines, milestones, and success metrics
 * Manage cross-functional internal teams (Sales, Product, Operations, Engineering)
 * Drive projects to on-time, on-budget delivery
   
   

Customer Consulting & Solution Design


 * Understand clients' business processes, KPIs, and operational challenges
 * Assess client software ecosystems and integration requirements
 * Translate business needs into structured technical implementation plans
 * Identify optimisation opportunities and scalable AI audio use cases
   
   

Stakeholder Management


 * Act as the primary implementation point of contact for client stakeholders
 * Partner with Sales to ensure smooth client kickoffs and clear expectation alignment
 * Run structured kick-offs, status updates, QBR inputs, and strategic check-ins
 * Build trusted relationships with agency partners and media teams
   
   

Operational Excellence


 * Standardise onboarding processes and implementation playbooks
 * Forecast onboarding capacity and coordinate sprint planning with Operations
 * Establish best practices for rollout across new markets and channels
 * Drive continuous improvement across tools, documentation, and workflows
   
   

Requirements

Experience


 * +3 years of experience in Implementation, Technical Account Management, Onboarding, or IT/Tech Consulting
 * Experience working with B2B or enterprise customers on complex technical projects
 * Exposure to AdTech, MarTech, or Ad Operations is highly desirable
 * Experience managing API-based or SaaS implementations is a strong plus
   
   

Skills


 * Strong project management capabilities (scope, risks, timelines, stakeholders)
 * Excellent written and verbal communication skills
 * Ability to explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical stakeholders
 * Structured problem-solving mindset
 * Highly organised, detail-oriented, and process-driven
 * Proficient in Google Sheets / Excel
   
   

Technical Aptitude


 * Strong understanding of APIs and integrations (coding experience is a plus, not required)
 * Comfortable navigating technical discussions with product and engineering teams
 * Passion for AI, audio technology, and scalable infrastructure
   
   

Benefits

🎛 The opportunity to work in a leading voice & audio AI company, with an exceptional tech team with diverse and highly recognised backgrounds.

🎹 Be part of a great story: we are making audio scalable for the first time in history.

📔 Great Learning & Development opportunities, such as our biweekly journal club - state-of-the-art papers or Friday wins, a proactive meeting to celebrate shipping of new software each week.

⏱ Hybrid working and Flexible working hours with 3 days in the office per week.

💰 Stock Options (subject to performance and time served).

🛠 The opportunity to shape a startup culture in a company in the fast-growing audio/video space.

🗺 A truly international and diverse team.

🥵 Offices in the hottest startup hubs London, Barcelona and New York.

🐶 Dog friendly offices (come and meet Swanson and Bernie)!

Why is now a really exciting time to join AudioStack 🚀

AudioStack is the leading Audio-As-A-Service company with a very strong technology stack and AI R&D team, featured in some of the leading media.

We have a great team and culture and you will be immersive in a very international environment and market.

We are still a small team of 30 people expanding rapidly internationally. As an early employee you have a lot of room to apply and grow your skills fast, build out a team and move quickly with your ideas, enjoying a lot of space, flexibility and trust.

🚀 Join us now to revolutionise how audio production is delivered at scale!

Our commitment to diversity 💗

We embrace diversity at www.audiostack.ai. To build a product that's loved by everyone, we need a team with all kinds of different perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds. That's why we're committed to hiring people regardless of race, religion, colour, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age or disability.

title: Diseñador Gráfico Senior
description:
Senior Graphic Designer in Alicante on site full time – Groël

At Groël, we're a growing family business with a genuine love for what we do — designing and crafting brass hardware that finds its way into beautiful spaces all around the world.

As the brand continues to evolve, we're looking for someone who sees design not just as a job, but as a language.

Someone who understands that every layout, every colour, every tiny detail says something about who we are.

If you're a creative mind with a sharp eye, a strong aesthetic sense and a passion for building visual stories, you might be the next person to join this journey with us.

What we're looking for

We need a Senior Graphic Designer with experience in branding, editorial design, and digital communication.

Someone organised, curious and meticulous — but also warm, imaginative, and genuinely excited about shaping the visual identity of a brand that is growing fast.

If you love turning concepts into visuals, enjoy working across different formats, and feel comfortable taking the lead creatively while collaborating with the team, you'll feel right at home here.

Your main responsibilities

Developing and maintaining the visual identity of the brand

Designing catalogues, brochures and all brand materials — from concept to final artwork

Creating digital content for social media, newsletters and website

Working closely with the marketing team to bring ideas to life

Coordinating with external suppliers, printers, photographers and videographers

Ensuring consistency and excellence across all touchpoints

Bringing fresh ideas, inspiration and visual direction to every project

Requirements

Availability to work on-site in Alicante (no remote options)

Strong experience in graphic design (5-7 working years)

Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite (InDesign, Illustrator, Photoshop)

Experience in editorial design and visual identity systems

A refined visual sensibility and attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

Comfortable working in English (other languages are a plus)

Photography or video editing knowledge is welcomed too

Schedule

Monday to Thursday: 9:*****:00 and 13:*****:00

 * € net per month (12 monthly payments, prorated).
   
   

What we offer

The chance to shape the future of Groël's visual world

A close, supportive team that values creativity and initiative

The opportunity to work on international projects that connect design, architecture and craftsmanship

A stable role in a brand that is growing and evolving

A warm, human environment where we take our work seriously — but never forget to enjoy the process

If you'd like to be part of a project where creativity, craftsmanship and people come first, we'd love to meet you.

Send Your CV And Portfolio To

title: Senior Recruiter
description:
Utopia is looking for a highly experienced Senior Recruiter to join our team and play a key role in building exceptional talent across the organization. This is not a junior or mid-level role — we are seeking a true recruitment professional who can operate independently, influence stakeholders, and own hiring processes end to end at a strategic level.

If you thrive in complex environments, enjoy autonomy, and want your work to have visible impact — this role is for you.

Why This Role Is Unique?


 * Exposure to diverse and high-impact roles across the teams
 * High level of trust, autonomy, and ownership
 * True remote-first culture, no micromanagement
 * International environment with stakeholders across multiple countries
 * Regular team buildings in different countries every 4 months!
 * Opportunity to influence hiring strategy, not just execute vacancies
   
   

Your Mission:

As a Senior Recruiter, you will be responsible for managing and scaling recruitment processes while maintaining a high bar for talent and candidate experience.

Key Responsibilities:


 * Own the full recruitment lifecycle from role intake to offer acceptance
 * Act as a strategic partner to hiring managers and leadership
 * Recruit for a wide range of positions (operations, corporate, support, senior roles, and niche positions)
 * Proactively source top-tier candidates using advanced sourcing techniques
 * Build and maintain long-term talent pipelines
 * Lead complex and senior-level hires independently
 * Ensure a consistently excellent candidate experience
 * Improve and optimize recruitment processes, tools, and workflows
 * Contribute to employer branding and hiring strategy discussions
   
   

Who We're Looking For

We are looking for a very experienced recruiter who is confident, structured, and capable of handling complexity.

Requirements:


 * Significant experience as a Senior Recruiter
 * Knowledge of Russian Language is a must
 * Proven track record of closing roles across different functions and levels
 * Strong stakeholder management and advisory skills
 * Ability to work independently and take full ownership of recruitment outcomes
 * Excellent communication and negotiation skills
 * Experience working with international or remote teams
 * Strong sourcing expertise and market awareness
 * High level of professionalism, discretion, and accountability
   
   

What We Offer?


 * Competitive salary aligned with senior-level expertise
 * Medical insurance
 * Fully remote work — work from anywhere
 * Team buildings in different countries
 * Supportive, people-focused culture
 * Long-term collaboration and stability
 * Opportunity to shape and elevate recruitment practices across the organization
   
   

Final Note:

This role is ideal for someone who:


 * Loves recruitment as a profession
 * Wants autonomy and responsibility
 * Enjoys working with smart, international teams
 * Is ready to be a trusted recruitment partner, not just a recruiter
   
   

If this sounds like you — we would love to meet you.

Apply now and become part of Utopia's growth journey.

title: Gerente de Restaurante

title: Agente Comercial Junior
description:
¡Únete a Bluespace como Agente comercial junior!




¿Quiénes somos?




Bluespace es la empresa líder de Self Storage en España, con más de 20 años de historia y presencia en 4 países. Contamos con más de 100 centros y vamos a por más: ¡185 en 5 años!




Nuestro compromiso: un entorno laboral excelente, desarrollo profesional, sostenibilidad y crecimiento.




¿Qué te ofrecemos?




- Contrato indefinido.

- Salario anual: 22.500 € brutos anuales.

- Jornada completa: L-V + 2 sábados al mes (solo mañanas).

- Beneficios: ticket restaurante/guardería, mutua médica, descuentos en nuestros productos/servicios.

- ¡Team buildings, deporte, ¡y momentos inolvidables! Como el Bluevent: un fin de semana al año en el que todo el equipo se reúne para celebrar lo que logramos juntos/as!

- Formación continua (plataforma propia y GoodHabitz).

- Acceso fácil y parking en todos los centros.

- Empresa comprometida con el medioambiente y la sostenibilidad.




Síguenos en redes (@bluespace_selfstorage) y descubre más en bluespace.es




¿Listo/a para el reto? Súmate a nuestro crecimiento y forma parte del equipo Bluespace. ¡Te estamos esperando!




En Bluespace garantizamos la igualdad de oportunidades en todos nuestros procesos de selección, fomentando un entorno laboral diverso, inclusivo y respetuoso.




- Pasión por las ventas y atención al cliente.

- Habilidades organizativas y actitud resolutiva.

- Proactividad, optimismo y ganas de aprender.

- Experiencia mínima de 1 año en posiciones de trato con clientes (venta, comercial).

- Conocimientos de ofimática (Word, Excel, Outlook, etc.).

- Disponibilidad para trabajar en cualquiera de los seis centros que Bluespace tiene en Madrid: Leganés, Mostoles, Los Rosales Mostoles, Vallecas y Antonio López .

- Vehículo propio (deseable).




Tu misión:




Como Agente comercial junior, estarás al frente de la atención al cliente (en tienda y por teléfono) con un claro foco en la venta activa y en ofrecer soluciones que impulsen los resultados comerciales. Tu rol incluirá la gestión de ventas y cierre de contratos, así como el seguimiento de facturación y tareas administrativas. Todo ello, con una clara orientación a resultados, soluciones y excelencia en el servicio.

title: Assistant Store Manager
description:
Necesitamos incorporar Assistants Store Manager en 📍 Madrid.

Reportando directamente a tu Store Manager te encargarás de:

 * Reclutamiento, formación y supervisión del equipo de ventas.
 * Asignación de horarios y funciones para asegurar una operación fluida.
 * Desarrollar el talento del equipo mediante evaluaciones de desempeño, retroalimentación y capacitación continua.
 * Supervisar las operaciones diarias, como la apertura y cierre de la tienda.
 * Asegurar el cumplimiento de los objetivos de facturación y KPIs de tienda:

 * Implementar promociones y estrategias de marketing locales.
 * Reporting

 * Garantizar altos niveles de satisfacción del cliente con venta personalizada y al detalle.
 * Colaborar en el crecimiento de nuestro programa de fidelización Member

 * Implementar medidas para evitar pérdidas y reducir el desperdicio de mercancías.
 * Cumplir con las políticas de seguridad y los procedimientos de la empresa.
   
   

Ofrecemos:

📃 Contrato indefinido

🕔 Jornada laboral de 5 días a la semana con 2 de descanso (el horario lo definirías tú como responsable de tienda junto con tu cuadro de mando)

💰 21.000 € - 23.000 € brutos anuales + comisiones mensuales de tienda
